member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Services.Helpers.LegacySyncService
member.summary: Service for synchronizing data between Core API and legacy file-based system Maintains backward compatibility during transition period

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Helpers.LegacySyncService.SyncUploadedDocument(HazinaStore.Core.Project,System.String,System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Synchronize uploaded document to legacy system Updates uploadedFiles.json with new file metadata

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Helpers.LegacySyncService.SyncUploadedDocument(HazinaStore.Core.Project,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Synchronize uploaded document to legacy system (overload for backward compatibility)

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Helpers.LegacySyncService.SyncDocumentMetadata(HazinaStore.Core.Project,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Synchronize document metadata after text extraction Updates token counts and file parts for existing entry

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Helpers.LegacySyncService.SyncDeletedDocument(HazinaStore.Core.Project,System.String)
member.summary: Synchronize deleted document to legacy system Removes file from uploadedFiles.json

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Helpers.LegacySyncService.InitializeStore(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initialize or reinitialize the legacy vector store Triggers embedding generation for all documents

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Helpers.LegacySyncService.SplitAndEmbedFile(System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Split large files into smaller chunks for embedding Legacy method for handling files that exceed token limits Returns list of file paths (strings) for the split files

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Helpers.LegacySyncService.GetLegacyUploadedFiles(HazinaStore.Core.Project)
member.summary: Get legacy uploadedFiles.json metadata for a project Used for backward compatibility during transition

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Services.UploadedDocumentsService
member.summary: Service for handling document uploads with text extraction and processing Refactored to use the new Core API

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.UploadedDocumentsService.UploadFile(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile,System.String)
member.summary: Upload a file from HTTP request

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.UploadedDocumentsService.AddOrUpdateFile(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Add or update a file with text content

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.UploadedDocumentsService.AddFile(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Add a new file with text content

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.UploadedDocumentsService.GetUploadedFiles(System.String)
member.summary: Get all uploaded files for a project

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.UploadedDocumentsService.UploadFileInternal(System.String,System.String,System.Byte[],System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Internal upload implementation using Core API

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.UploadedDocumentsService.ExtractTextInBackground(HazinaStore.Core.Project,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Extract text from uploaded file in background

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.UploadedDocumentsService.SaveFileAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile,System.String)
member.summary: Save an uploaded file to disk

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.UploadedDocumentsService.DetermineFileTags(System.String,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Determine appropriate tags based on file name and content
